text:
Once upon a time, there was a cat named Luna who had an amazing talent – she could talk! One day, a mysterious creature named Garbert came to visit Luna. Garbert was from a distant land, and he could sing songs that nobody had ever heard before. Luna listened to his songs every day, and she loved them!

One day, Luna had a dream that she could fly. She imagined herself soaring through the sky. She sang a song about sky dragons and big feathers. Every night, she dreamt about flying.

One night, when Luna was sleeping, Garbert flew into her bedroom. He sang a song that made her dream even more vivid. Luna became a beautiful eagle, flying high above the clouds.

Garbert sang many songs, and Luna learned many new things about the world. She saw the wonders of the sky and learned to sing like a bird. Every night, Luna dreamt of flying just like Garbert.
